current_project_moment: Ledger system buildout Phase 5 is complete and the first runnable ledger steward (global_ledger_steward) has landed. Open Problems joins Global (P1), Temporal Continuity (P2), North Star (P3), and File Directory (P4); 13 active problems + 1 closed. The Global Ledger Steward now runs through POST /api/agents/global_ledger_steward/run with scoped local write authority, receipt output, and activity logging.
current_phase: Early automation proof with safety cleanup
next_recommended_read: Auto/Client Boxes/Brenda & Steve/2026-04-28_audit_marker.md (the only box with explicit audit so far)
rule_when_global_and_temporal_conflict: Global Ledger wins for permanent project identity and rules. Temporal Continuity wins for current working state.

active_workstreams.current_step: Phase 5 Open Problems Ledger landed; first steward automation active
active_workstreams.last_completed: Phases 1-5 — Global + Temporal Continuity + North Star + File Directory + Open Problems — plus global_ledger_steward app agent
active_workstreams.workflow: user types P (or uploads next ledger spec) to proceed; use global_ledger_steward for global-memory maintenance sweeps

active_workstreams.current_method: one box at a time. read, audit, clean if approved, leave audit marker, stamp BOX_LEDGER_TEMPLATE if graduating to full Box

active_workstreams.summary: All 28 client boxes carry 01b_comms_verbatim.md + comms/*.json (582 raw payloads). Boxes UI page renders 01_comms.md only — verbatim file not yet bound.
active_workstreams.open: Wire 01b_comms_verbatim.md as a second comms tab in BoxesScreen when ready

active_workstreams.summary: Separate comms-confirmed facts from enrichment-only/internal/protected facts. Customer-facing copy must ground in comms or explicit operator approval.
Working tree dirty with this session's writes (LEDGERS/, CLAUDE.md, AGENT.md, README.md, activity.jsonl). Direct GitHub writes need Jake's go-ahead.
Hard gates exist in Auto/comeketo-inbox/. Missing: automation-page surfacing of guardrail check as explicit approval card rather than batched approval.

active_assumptions: GitHub is the durable source of truth.
Local working copy may contain unpushed work — direct GitHub writes require caution.
File-tree orchestration is preferred over RAG-style memory.
Boxes are the preferred local memory structure.
Plans are subordinate to comms, state, guardrails, and approvals.
Client replies invalidate or pause existing plans.
Enrichment is internal-only — not customer-facing copy.
Comeketo wants visible automation movement, but Jake wants safer/controlled.
Verbatim comms (01b_comms_verbatim.md) is now the highest-fidelity client truth in each box.
Pieces.app at localhost:39300 is the memory backend.
The Auto/ alias is read-mostly; writes need explicit team authorization.

active_risks.summary: Some plans may contain unsafe executable copy written before guardrails were enforced. Brenda was the first to receive an explicit audit; the other 27 plans have not been re-validated.
Risky moves (fee waivers, discounts, pricing claims, enrichment-based personalization) can be missed during rushed batch approval. They should require isolated approval cards.
Reply → plan is stale rule is documented but not yet automation-enforced.
Manual discipline only until allowed-to-know layer is built.
Direct GitHub commits can conflict with local unpushed work. Pre-existing dirty files (pieces_sweeps.jsonl, Flávia Benson.txt) should not be bundled with this session's commits without confirming.
Boxes UI page is slightly behind disk reality — verbatim comms exists in every box but is not yet UI-bound.
Verbatim backfill wrote through Auto/ symlink to /Users/jakeaaron/Desktop/Auto/. Those writes don't appear in main repo git status. If standalone Auto/ has its own git scope, track separately.

human_preferences: One ledger at a time. Wait for Jake's signal (typically 'P' or next spec upload).
Outlines should be implementation-ready but not overfit to a single implementation.
Markdown + JSON + visual maps are the preferred ledger shape.
Client Box work is one box at a time.
No risky writes without awareness — leave a handoff note if a change would surprise a future agent.
Safe movement over aggressive cleverness for early Comeketo automation.
Energy-driven collaboration: Jake orchestrates, Claude does fine details. Don't ask 4 clarifying questions on well-specified tasks.
No commit/push without explicit go-ahead when there's risk of stepping on local unpushed work.
Hercules mode signals trust — execute the spec rigorously without permission checks.

next_handoff.if_user_signals_next_ledger: Wait for spec. Build same way as Phases 1-2: tasks → artifacts → wire into Global + INDEX → ledger-log → return clean summary. Don't jump ahead. Use global_ledger_steward in audit-only mode for global-memory drift checks.
next_handoff.if_user_says_commit_or_push: Run git status first. This session adds: LEDGERS/ (new), CCAgentindex/agents/global_ledger_steward/, CCAgentindex/_ledger/ledger_steward_runs/, CLAUDE.md, AGENT.md, README.md, CCAgentindex/_ledger/activity.jsonl. Don't bundle pre-existing dirty files (pieces_sweeps.jsonl, Flávia Benson.txt) without confirming. Don't push without explicit go-ahead.
next_handoff.if_continuing_client_box_audit: Use Brenda & Steve as the template. Read both 01_comms.md AND 01b_comms_verbatim.md before changing. Leave YYYY-MM-DD_audit_marker.md and prepend Audit-cleaned line to plan/alerts.
next_handoff.if_continuing_verbatim_comms: Pull script at outputs/pull_full_comms.py is one-shot. Promote to Auto/Onboard Scripts/ if recurring. Close API key was env-only — Jake re-supplies for refresh.

recently_touched.summary: Added 01b_comms_verbatim.md + comms/*.json to every box (582 raw payloads). Existing 01_comms.md summaries untouched.

Created from scratch this session. Phase 1 (Global Ledger + INDEX + 3 visuals + 2 templates), Phase 2 (Temporal Continuity Ledger + .json + 2 visuals), Phase 3 (North Star Ledger + .json + 2 visuals), Phase 4 (File Directory Ledger + .json + 2 visuals + 5 open problems surfaced), Phase 5 (Open Problems Ledger + .json + 3 visuals; 13 active + 1 closed), plus canonical Global Ledger Steward package under LEDGERS/AGENTS/.
Runnable app-agent spec and prompt for Global Ledger Steward. Dispatch path: POST /api/agents/global_ledger_steward/run.
Receipt directory for Global Ledger Steward runs.
Read-first pointers wired into all three top-level meta files.
Boxes-page section: new Assets line for verbatim comms + 2026-04-28 history entry. Top-level Last updated bumped.
Six entries appended this session: verbatim backfill, Global Ledger Phase 1, Temporal Continuity Phase 2, North Star Phase 3, File Directory Phase 4, Open Problems Phase 5.
